## AI Video Creator v1.0.6

### Addon auto-update (Setup Hub)
- **Check / Update all addons** for Open-Sora (git pull/clone + pip), Python embed (Windows), and FFmpeg (Windows)
- **Auto-update toggle** — runs after each environment scan when updates are available
- Managed addons install under app userData; paths auto-link to Director

### Setup Hub enhancements
- **Persist last scan** + **Fix for local MP4** checklist with panel links
- Shared environment scan module for Electron + CLI smoke scripts

### Project bundles
- Export format **`ai-video-creator-bundle`** (`ai-video-bundle.json`)
- Import still accepts legacy **`ai-music-creator-bundle`**

### CLI smoke tools
- `npm run smoke:desktop` — environment scan without Electron
- `npm run smoke:local-mp4` — local MP4 prerequisite check
- `npm run addons:check` — addon update report

### Fixes
- Project reset clears Open-Sora settings and Setup Hub scan cache
- Open-Sora / apply-maxed helpers preserve existing Open-Sora prefs
- v1.0.5 GitHub release notes filled in

Installed **v1.0.5** apps should pick this up via GitHub auto-update, or download the new installer below.
